articles.title_raw: Галузин заявил о начале процесса вступления Армении в ЕС
articles.lead_raw: Ереван уже предпринимает практические шаги в этом направлении, сообщил замглавы МИД РФ

articles.title_en: Erdogan: Türkiye is working to resume negotiations on Ukraine
articles.lead_en: In 2025, three rounds of direct Russian-Ukrainian negotiations were held in Istanbul
articles.title_raw: Эрдоган: Турция работает над возобновлением переговоров по Украине
articles.lead_raw: В 2025 году в Стамбуле прошли три раунда прямых российско-украинских переговоров

articles.title_en: Galuzin suggested why Yerevan is in no hurry to hold a referendum on the EAEU
articles.lead_en: This may be due to opportunistic considerations of the Armenian authorities, says the Deputy Foreign Minister of the Russian Federation
articles.title_raw: Галузин предположил, почему Ереван не спешит с референдумом по ЕАЭС
articles.lead_raw: Это может быть связано с конъюнктурными соображениями властей Армении, считает замглавы МИД РФ

articles.title_en: Galuzin: the timing of the visit of the Azerbaijani Foreign Minister to Moscow is being worked out
articles.lead_en: The Deputy Foreign Minister of the Russian Federation noted that Russia plans to discuss with Azerbaijani colleagues the whole range of issues of bilateral relations
articles.title_raw: Галузин: сроки визита главы МИД Азербайджана в Москву прорабатываются
articles.lead_raw: Замглавы МИД РФ отметил, что Россия планирует обсудить с азербайджанскими коллегами весь комплекс вопросов двусторонних отношений

articles.title_en: Galuzin: the “Trump Road” project in Armenia will pass through a zone protected by the Russian Federation
articles.lead_en: Yerevan will have to take into account the opinion of Moscow, noted the Deputy Head of the Russian Foreign Ministry
articles.title_raw: Галузин: проект "дороги Трампа" в Армении пройдет через зону, охраняемую РФ
articles.lead_raw: Еревану придется учитывать мнение Москвы, отметил замглавы МИД России

articles.title_en: Galuzin: Iran and China are unlikely to be delighted with the “Trump Road” in Armenia
articles.lead_en: Beijing is unlikely to like the fact that the American side will control part of the transport and logistics route from Central Asia to Europe, noted the Deputy Foreign Minister of the Russian Federation
articles.title_raw: Галузин: Иран и Китай вряд ли будут в восторге от "дороги Трампа" в Армении
articles.lead_raw: Пекину едва ли понравится, что американская сторона будет контролировать часть транспортно-логистического маршрута из Центральной Азии в Европу, отметил замглавы МИД РФ

articles.title_en: Kremlin delivers remarks on Putin-Lukashenko talks, Ukraine dialogue channels
articles.lead_en: Russian Presidential Spokesman Dmitry Peskov stressed that Russia's position on Ukraine, outlined by Vladimir Putin during his address at the Russian Foreign Ministry two years ago, remains unchanged
articles.title_raw: Kremlin delivers remarks on Putin-Lukashenko talks, Ukraine dialogue channels
articles.lead_raw: Russian Presidential Spokesman Dmitry Peskov stressed that Russia's position on Ukraine, outlined by Vladimir Putin during his address at the Russian Foreign Ministry two years ago, remains unchanged

articles.title_en: Russian PM Mishustin joins Putin-Lukashenko talks as economy takes focus — Kremlin
articles.lead_en: The agenda was primarily focused on bilateral relations, trade and economic cooperation, Dmitry Peskov said
articles.title_raw: Russian PM Mishustin joins Putin-Lukashenko talks as economy takes focus — Kremlin
articles.lead_raw: The agenda was primarily focused on bilateral relations, trade and economic cooperation, Dmitry Peskov said

articles.title_en: Putin convenes meeting of government officials, Russian oil majors on fuel situation
articles.lead_en: The Russian president authorized efforts to minimize the impact of Ukrainian terrorist attacks on Russian civilian facilities
articles.title_raw: Putin convenes meeting of government officials, Russian oil majors on fuel situation
articles.lead_raw: The Russian president authorized efforts to minimize the impact of Ukrainian terrorist attacks on Russian civilian facilities
